title: 🚀 GenAI Foundations Workshop — 4 Days Live (FREE)
summary: A fast-paced, beginner-friendly GenAI workshop for software professionals. Understand what GenAI really is, how it differs from ML/DL, explore RAG, Agents, and build real AI workflows using n8n — all in 4 live sessions.
features: 🧠 Understand what GenAI is (without ML confusion)
⚖️ GenAI vs Machine Learning vs Deep Learning — clearly explained
📦 Learn RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) with real-world context
🤖 Understand AI Agents & Agentic AI (no hype, practical view)
⚙️ Live demo: Build AI workflows using n8n
🏢 How GenAI is impacting developers, QA, architects, managers
🚨 Why GenAI is no longer optional for your career
🎯 Clarity on what to learn, what to ignore, and where to start
👨‍🏫 Live teaching + real examples (not recorded content)
📺 NO Recording available
duration: 4 Days Weekend Workshop (2 hours each day: 8PM-10PM)

title: ⚡ GenAI Developer Fast Track — 3 Months (Weekend Live Cohort)
summary: Stop watching tutorials. Start building real GenAI systems. In just 12 weeks, go from confusion to execution by building RAG systems, AI agents, and deploying production-ready applications — live, with guidance.
features: 🚀 Build a production-ready RAG system (not a demo)
🤖 Create AI agents with tools, memory, and workflows
🧠 Understand how LLMs actually work (no fluff, only what matters)
⚙️ Design and build end-to-end GenAI backend systems
☁️ Deploy your system to cloud with logging & monitoring
📦 Work on real-world use cases (not toy projects)
🔁 Weekly deliverables — no passive learning
👨‍🏫 Live weekend sessions with direct mentor guidance
🔥 Fast-paced cohort designed for execution, not theory
🎯 Leave with systems you can confidently show in interviews
⚡ Perfect for developers who don’t want to wait 6 months to become relevant
📅 12 Weeks · Saturday + Sunday · 8–10 PM IST

title: Becoming Creative - 12-Week Workshop
summary: Unlock imagination, overcome creative blocks, and master the art of thinking differently. Perfect for artists, professionals, and anyone seeking fresh inspiration.
features: 24 hours of live instruction
Small cohort (max 30)
Downloadable exercises & worksheets
Lifetime access to recordings
Certificate of completion

title: AI Architecture & Agentic Systems (6-Month Live Cohort)
summary: A career-rewriting program to help experienced backend developers transition into AI architects by translating their existing 5+ years of engineering experience into production-grade AI systems.
features: Translate your backend experience to AI system design using the Architecture Lens Framework
Master 5 Agentic AI design patterns and where each fits in real-world systems
Design 6 production-grade systems including Customer Support AI, Financial Advisory AI, Multi-Agent Flows & more
Deploy 2 full production systems to AWS/GCP and capture live metrics (required for graduation)
Hands-on implementation: pipelines, orchestration, monitoring, observability & cost optimization
Career Velocity Path: LinkedIn positioning, resume reframing, system design interviews & salary negotiation
Start with the 5-Day GenAI Architecture Workshop. Decide later if the 6-month cohort is right for you.
Live every Sat & Sun (8–10 AM IST) + lifetime access to all recordings & community
Next Cohort: Sep 05 2026 – Feb 28, 2027
Cohort Size: Only 30 seats (intentionally selective)
